name: the emitted full-surface grounding is deterministic (same namespaces across runs)
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/full-surface-consult.sh" --emit-grounding 2>/dev/null > g1.json; bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/full-surface-consult.sh" --emit-grounding 2>/dev/null > g2.json; node -e 'const a=require("./g1.json").grounded_namespaces.join(",");const b=require("./g2.json").grounded_namespaces.join(",");process.exit(a===b?0:1)' && echo grounding-deterministic 1>&2
